version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Switches MIDIFighter Twister to bank 1.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Switches MIDIFighter Twister to bank 2.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Switches MIDIFighter Twister to bank 3.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Switches MIDIFighter Twister to bank 4.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Startup script that loads libraries and runs toolbar sync loop.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toolbar entry point script.

reapack.name: Velocitone - Color Gradient for Child Tracks.lua
reapack.desc: Velocitone: Color Gradient for Child Tracks

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Applies color gradient across child tracks based on parent track color.

reapack.name: Velocitone - Color Media Items Variation Of Parent Track Color.lua
reapack.desc: Velocitone: Color Selected Media Items Variation Of Parent Track Color

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Colors media items with randomized variations of parent track color.

reapack.name: Velocitone - Track FX In Same Docker Window.lua
reapack.desc: Velocitone: Track FX In Same Docker Window

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Opens track FX in the same docker window (experimental).

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Find-and-replace characters in selected track names.

reapack.name: Velocitone - Select Visible MCP Track - Controller.lua
reapack.desc: Velocitone: Select Visible MCP Track - Controller

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Hardware encoder input to select next/previous visible MCP track.

reapack.name: Velocitone - Select Visible MCP Track - Next.lua
reapack.desc: Velocitone: Select Visible MCP Track - Next

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Selects the next visible track in the Mixer Control Panel.

reapack.name: Velocitone - Select Visible MCP Track - Previous.lua
reapack.desc: Velocitone: Select Visible MCP Track - Previous

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Selects the previous visible track in the Mixer Control Panel.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [audio] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [buss] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [channelstrip] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles custom tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [folder] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [fx] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [gfx] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [midi] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [output] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [stem] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [section] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [tape] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles [vsti] tag on selected track name.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Clears all tag filters and restores full track visibility.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles track visibility filter for [audio] tagged tracks.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles track visibility filter for [buss] tagged tracks.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles track visibility filter for [channelstrip] tagged tracks.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles track visibility filter for custom tagged tracks.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles track visibility filter for [folder] tagged tracks.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles track visibility filter for [fx] tagged tracks.

version.author: chrislundeen
version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles track visibility filter for [midi] tagged tracks.

version.changelog: Initial Velocitone release. Toggles track visibility filter for [output] tagged tracks.
